• Requisiti - Abgeschlossene technische Ausbildung wie Elektriker:in, Elektromonteur:in, Mechaniker:in, Polymechaniker:in oder ähnlich. - Wenn du dich mit Liften bereits auskennst ist das ein grosser Vorteil - Du sprichst fliessend Deutsch - Einen Führerschein der Kategorie B setzen wir voraus, ebenso wie einen Wohnort im Einsatzgebiet ##
• Cosa offriamo - Marktgerechte und wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung - Erfolgsprämien - Gute Pensionskasse - 5 Wochen Urlaub - Verpflegungszuschuss - Du wirst von einer Fachperson top eingearbeitet und begleitet - Du bekommst ein Firmenfahrzeug für die Arbeit und Privat - Du wirst von uns unterstützt und hast großartige Aufstiegsmöglichkeiten ## Perché Otis? Otis gibt Menschen die Möglichkeit, sich in einer größeren, schnelleren und intelligenteren Welt zu verbinden. Als weltweit führendes Unternehmen in der Herstellung, Installation und Wartung von Aufzügen und Fahrtreppen bewegen wir täglich 2.4 Milliarden Menschen und verfügen mit über 2.4 Millionen Anlagen über das weltweite größte Wartungsportfolio der Branche. Sicherheit hat oberste Priorität Qualität ist ein tägliches Versprechen Ethik, Zusammenarbeit und stetige Weiterentwicklung sind feste Bestandteile unserer Unternehmens­kultur Unsere Mitarbeitenden stehen im Mittelpunkt unseres Erfolgs Mehr Informationen über unsere «Otis Absolutes» findest Du hier. ## Steige ein – Steige auf! Haben wir Dich überzeugt? Dann freuen wir uns auf Deine Bewerbung! Bitte teile uns in deinem Anschreiben mit, für welche der drei Positionen Du dich interessierst. If you live in a city, chances are we will give you a lift or play a role in keeping you moving every day. Otis is the world’s leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, and service company. We move 2.4 billion people every day and maintain approximately 2.4 million customer units worldwide, the industry's largest Service portfolio. You may recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous landmarks including the Eiffel Tower, Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people strong, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, and functional specialists, as well as factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in more than 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse, global team with a proven legacy of innovation that continues to be the bedrock of a fast-moving, high-performance company. When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global industry leader with a resilient business model. You’ll belong to a diverse, trusted, and caring community where your contributions, and the skills and capabilities you’ll gain working alongside the best and brightest, keep us connected and on the cutting edge. We provide opportunities, training, and resources, that build leadership and capabilities in Sales, Field, Engineering and Major Projects and our Employee Scholar Program is a notable point of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to pursue degrees or certification programs. Today, our focus more than ever is on people. As a global, people-powered company, we put people – passengers, customers, and colleagues – at the center of everything we do. We are guided by our values that we call our Three Absolutes – prioritizing Safety, Ethics, Quality in all that we do. If you would like to learn more about environmental, social and governance (ESG) at Otis click here. Become a part of the Otis team and help us #Buildwhatsnext! Otis is An Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status, age, o qualsiasi altra classe protetta secondo la legge applicabile. Per richiedere un accomodamento nella compilazione di una domanda di lavoro a causa di una necessità speciale o di una disabilità, contattaci all’indirizzo careers@otis.com. ## and Terms Click on this link to read the Policy and Terms
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description Date de publication : 14/01/2025 Pays : Suisse Lieu : Kreuzstrasse 34, 6010 Kriens Rejoignez notre équipe à Lucerne ! Avis Important Cette offre ne concerne pas un poste actuellement vacant. Si aucune position adaptée à votre profil n’est disponible pour le moment, nous pouvons intégrer votre candidature dans notre Talent Pool. Nous vous informerons dès qu’un poste correspondant à vos qualifications et intérêts sera disponible. ## Missions - Monteur(s) (installations neuves et modernisations) - Technicien(s) de service - Réparateur(s) ##
• Exigences - Formation technique complète comme électricien, monteur électrique, mécanicien, technicien en mécatronique ou similaire. - La connaissance des ascenseurs est un grand avantage - Parlez couramment allemand - Permis de conduire de catégorie B requis, ainsi qu’une résidence dans la zone d’intervention ## Ce que nous offrons - Rémunération compétitive et attractive - Primes de performance - Bonne caisse de pension - 5 semaines de congés - Indemnité de repas - Vous serez formé et accompagné par un professionnel - Vous disposerez d’un véhicule de société pour le travail et l’usage privé - Nous vous soutenons et offrons d’excellentes possibilités d’évolution ## Pourquoi Otis ? Otis permet aux personnes de se connecter dans un monde plus grand, plus rapide et plus intelligent. En tant que leader mondial dans la fabrication, l’installation et la maintenance d’ascenseurs et d’escaliers mécaniques, nous déplaçons 2,4 milliards de personnes chaque jour et gérons le plus grand portefeuille de services du secteur avec plus de 2,4 millions d’installations dans le monde. La sécurité est notre priorité absolue La qualité est une promesse quotidienne L’éthique, la collaboration et le développement continu sont des piliers de notre culture d’entreprise Nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès Pour plus d’informations sur nos « Otis Absolutes », cliquez ici. ## Rejoignez-nous – Progressez avec nous ! Vous êtes convaincu ? Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience ! Veuillez préciser dans votre lettre de motivation laquelle des trois positions vous intéresse. Si vous vivez en ville, il y a de fortes chances que nous vous accompagnions ou que nous jouions un rôle pour vous maintenir en mouvement chaque jour. Otis est le leader mondial dans la fabrication, l’installation et le service d’ascenseurs et d’escaliers mécaniques. Nous déplaçons 2,4 milliards de personnes chaque jour et entretenons environ 2,4 millions d’unités clients dans le monde, le plus grand portefeuille de services du secteur. Vous pouvez reconnaître nos produits dans certains des monuments les plus célèbres du monde, tels que la Tour Eiffel, l’Empire State Building, le Burj Khalifa et les Tours Jumelles Petronas ! Nous sommes 72 000 personnes, comprenant des ingénieurs, des experts en technologie numérique, des commerciaux, des spécialistes fonctionnels, ainsi que des techniciens en usine et sur le terrain, tous engagés à répondre aux besoins divers de nos clients et passagers dans plus de 200 pays et territoires à travers le monde. Nous sommes fiers d’être une équipe mondiale et diversifiée, avec un héritage d’innovation qui continue de constituer la pierre angulaire d’une entreprise performante et en mouvement rapide. En rejoignant Otis, vous faites partie d’un leader mondial innovant avec un modèle d’affaires résilient. Vous appartenez à une communauté diversifiée, fiable et bienveillante, où vos contributions et les compétences que vous acquerrez en travaillant aux côtés des meilleurs et des plus brillants nous maintiennent connectés et à la pointe.
• Nous offrons des opportunités, des formations et des ressources qui développent le leadership et les compétences dans la vente, le terrain, l’ingénierie et les grands projets. Notre programme Employee Scholar est une source de fierté, parrainant des collègues pour poursuivre des diplômes ou des certifications. Aujourd’hui, plus que jamais, notre focus est sur les personnes. En tant qu’entreprise mondiale et axée sur les personnes, nous plaçons les passagers, les clients et les collègues au centre de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous sommes guidés par nos valeurs, que nous appelons nos Trois Absolus : Prioriser la sécurité, l’éthique et la qualité dans tout ce que nous faisons. Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur la gouvernance environnementale, sociale et d’entreprise (ESG) chez Otis, cliquez ici. Rejoignez l’équipe Otis et aidez-nous à #Buildwhatsnext ! Otis est un employeur offrant l’égalité des chances. Tous les candidats qualifiés seront considérés pour un emploi sans distinction de race, couleur, religion, sexe, orientation sexuelle, identité de genre, origine nationale, handicap ou statut de vétéran, âge ou toute autre classe protégée selon la loi applicable. Pour demander un aménagement lors de la soumission d’une candidature en raison d’un besoin particulier ou d’un handicap, contactez-nous à careers@otis.com. ## Politique de Confidentialité et Conditions Cliquez sur ce lien pour lire la Politique et les Conditions.

jobs.description:
Date Posted:
2025-01-14Country: 
SwitzerlandLocation: 
Nenzlingerweg 2, 4153 Reinach

Werde Teil unseres Teams in Basel!

Wichtiger Hinweis
Diese Ausschreibung bezieht sich nicht auf eine aktuell offene Position. Sollte derzeit keine passende Stelle für Dein Profil verfügbar sein, nehmen wir Deine Bewerbung gerne in unseren Talentpool auf. Wir informieren Dich , sobald eine geeignete Position frei wird, die Deinen Qualifikationen und Interessen entspricht.  

Dein zukünftiges Team – Otis Basel

• Monteure / Installateure

• Servicetechniker

• Reparatur-/Modernisierungstechniker

Voraussetzungen

• ein eidgenössischer Fachausweis (FA) als Elektriker, Elektroniker, Elektromechaniker, Mechaniker, Polymechaniker, aus der Automobilbranche oder einer gleichwertigen Qualifikation

• mehrjährige Berufserfahrung im praktischen technischen Bereich, idealerweise in der Aufzugsbranche

• ein Wohnsitz innerhalb eines Radius von 50 km vom Abfahrtsort oder Niederlassung Bern/Belp

• fliessende Deutschkenntnisse erforderlich für den täglichen Kundenkontakt

• eine gültigen Schweizer Führerausweis Kat. B

• Schwindelfrei für Arbeiten in der Höhe 

Was wir Dir bieten

• Marktgerechte und wettbewerbsfähige Vergütung

• leistungsbezogene Boni

• Gute Pensionskasse

• 5 Wochen Urlaub

• Verpflegungszuschuss

• die Vorteile des Betriebsrats

• Du wirst von einer Fachperson top eingearbeitet und begleitet

• Du bekommst ein Firmenfahrzeug für die Arbeit und Privat

• Du wirst von uns unterstützt und hast großartige Aufstiegsmöglichkeiten

Warum Otis?
Otis gibt Menschen die Möglichkeit, sich in einer größeren, schnelleren und intelligenteren Welt zu verbinden. Als weltweit führendes Unternehmen in der  Herstellung, Installation und Wartung von Aufzügen und Fahrtreppen bewegen wir täglich 2.4 Milliarden Menschen und verfügen mit über 2.4 Millionen Anlagen über das weltweite größte Wartungsportfolio der Branche.

• Sicherheit hat oberste Priorität

• Qualität ist ein tägliches Versprechen

• Ethik, Zusammenarbeit und stetige Weiterentwicklung sind feste Bestandteile unserer Unternehmens­kultur

• Unsere Mitarbeitenden stehen im Mittelpunkt unseres Erfolgs

Mehr Informationen über unsere «Otis Absolutes» findest Du hier.

Steige ein – Steige auf!
Haben wir Dich überzeugt? Dann freuen wir uns auf Deine Bewerbung! Bitte teile uns in deinem Anschreiben mit, für welche der drei Positionen Du dich interessierst.

If you live in a city, chances are we will give you a lift or play a role in keeping you moving every day. 

Otis is the world’s leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, and service company. We move 2.4 billion people every day and maintain approximately 2.4 million customer units worldwide, the industry's largest Service portfolio.  

You may recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous landmarks including the Eiffel Tower, Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people strong, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, and functional specialists, as well as factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in more than 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse, global team with a proven legacy of innovation that continues to be the bedrock of a fast-moving, high-performance company.  

When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global industry leader with a resilient business model. You’ll belong to a diverse, trusted, and caring community where your contributions, and the skills and capabilities you’ll gain working alongside the best and brightest, keep us connected and on the cutting edge.  

We provide opportunities, training, and resources, that build leadership and capabilities in Sales, Field, Engineering and Major Projects and our Employee Scholar Program is a notable point of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to pursue degrees or certification programs.   

Today, our focus more than ever is on people. As a global, people-powered company, we put people – passengers, customers, and colleagues – at the center of everything we do.  We are guided by our values that we call our Three Absolutes – prioritizing Safety, Ethics, Quality in all that we do. If you would like to learn more about environmental, social and governance (ESG) at Otis click here.  

Become a part of the Otis team and help us #Buildwhatsnext! 
Otis is An Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status, age, or any other protected class according to applicable law. To request an accommodation in completing an employment application due to a special need or a disability, please contact us at careers@otis.com.

Descrizione Data di pubblicazione: 14/01/2025 Paese: Svizzera Luogo: Nenzlingerweg 2, 4153 Reinach Diventa parte del nostro team a Basilea! Avviso importante Questa offerta non si riferisce a una posizione attualmente aperta. Se al momento non ci sono posizioni adatte al tuo profilo, possiamo inserire la tua candidatura nel nostro Talentpool. Ti informeremo non appena si renderà disponibile una posizione che corrisponde alle tue qualifiche e ai tuoi interessi. ## Il tuo futuro team – Otis Basel ### Posizioni aperte - Montatori / Installatori - Tecnici di servizio - Tecnici di riparazione / modernizzazione ##
• Requisiti - un attestato professionale federale (FA) come elettricista, elettronico, elettromeccanico, meccanico, polymechanic, proveniente dal settore automobilistico o con qualifiche equivalenti - pluriennale esperienza professionale nel settore tecnico pratico, preferibilmente nel settore ascensori - residenza entro un raggio di 50 km dal luogo di partenza o filiale di Bern/Belp - conoscenza fluente del tedesco per il contatto quotidiano con i clienti - patente di guida svizzera valida categoria B - assenza di vertigini per lavori in altezza ##
• Cosa offriamo - retribuzione competitiva e adeguata al mercato - bonus legati alla performance - buona cassa pensionistica - 5 settimane di ferie - indennità di ristorazione - i vantaggi del consiglio di fabbrica - formazione e accompagnamento da parte di un professionista - veicolo aziendale per lavoro e uso privato - supporto e grandi possibilità di crescita ## Perché Otis? Otis dà alle persone la possibilità di connettersi in un mondo più grande, più veloce e più intelligente. Come azienda leader mondiale nella produzione, installazione e manutenzione di ascensori e scale mobili, muoviamo ogni giorno 2.4 miliardi di persone e disponiamo del più grande portafoglio di manutenzione al mondo con oltre 2.4 milioni di impianti. Puoi riconoscere i nostri prodotti in alcuni dei monumenti più famosi del mondo, tra cui la Torre Eiffel, l'Empire State Building, il Burj Khalifa e le Petronas Twin Towers! Siamo 72.000 persone, tra ingegneri, esperti di tecnologia digitale, vendite, specialisti funzionali, tecnici di fabbrica e di campo, tutti impegnati a soddisfare le esigenze diversificate dei nostri clienti e passeggeri in più di 200 paesi e territori nel mondo. Siamo orgogliosi di essere un team diversificato e globale con una lunga storia di innovazione che continua a essere la base di un'azienda ad alte prestazioni e in rapido movimento. Quando ti unisci a Otis, diventi parte di un leader globale innovativo con un modello di business resiliente. Fai parte di una comunità diversificata, affidabile e premurosa, dove i tuoi contributi, le competenze e le capacità che acquisirai lavorando con i migliori e più brillanti, ci tengono connessi e all'avanguardia.
• Offriamo opportunità, formazione e risorse che sviluppano leadership e competenze in Vendite, Campo, Ingegneria e Grandi Progetti. Il nostro Employee Scholar Program è motivo di orgoglio, attraverso il quale Otis sponsorizza colleghi per conseguire lauree o certificazioni. Oggi, il nostro focus più che mai è sulle persone. Come azienda globale, orientata alle persone, mettiamo al centro di tutto i passeggeri, i clienti e i colleghi. Siamo guidati dai nostri valori, che chiamiamo i nostri Tre Assoluti – Priorità alla Sicurezza, Etica, Qualità in tutto ciò che facciamo. Se vuoi saperne di più su ESG (ambientale, sociale e di governance) in Otis, clicca qui. ## Unisciti a Otis e #Buildwhatsnext! Haben wir Dich überzeugt? Dann freuen wir uns auf Deine Bewerbung! Bitte teile uns in deinem Anschreiben mit, für welche der drei Positionen Du dich interessierst. ## Chi siamo Otis è il principale produttore, installatore e fornitore di servizi di ascensori e scale mobili nel mondo. Muoviamo 2.4 miliardi di persone ogni giorno e manteniamo circa 2.4 milioni di unità clienti in tutto il mondo, con il più grande portafoglio di servizi del settore. Puoi riconoscere i nostri prodotti in alcuni dei monumenti più famosi del mondo, tra cui la Torre Eiffel, l'Empire State Building, il Burj Khalifa e le Petronas Twin Towers! Siamo 72.000 persone, tra ingegneri, esperti di tecnologia digitale, vendite, specialisti funzionali, tecnici di fabbrica e di campo, tutti impegnati a soddisfare le esigenze diversificate dei nostri clienti e passeggeri in più di 200 paesi e territori nel mondo. Siamo orgogliosi di essere un team diversificato e globale con una lunga storia di innovazione che continua a essere la base di un'azienda ad alte prestazioni e in rapido movimento. Quando ti unisci a Otis, diventi parte di un leader globale innovativo con un modello di business resiliente. Fai parte di una comunità diversificata, affidabile e premurosa, dove i tuoi contributi, le competenze e le capacità che acquisirai lavorando con i migliori e più brillanti, ci tengono connessi e all'avanguardia.
• Offriamo opportunità, formazione e risorse, che sviluppano leadership e competenze in Vendite, Campo, Ingegneria e Grandi Progetti e il nostro Employee Scholar Program è motivo di orgoglio, attraverso il quale Otis sponsorizza colleghi per conseguire lauree o certificazioni. Oggi, il nostro focus più che mai è sulle persone. Come azienda globale, orientata alle persone, mettiamo al centro di tutto i passeggeri, i clienti e i colleghi. Siamo guidati dai nostri valori, che chiamiamo i nostri Tre Assoluti – Priorità alla Sicurezza, Etica, Qualità in tutto ciò che facciamo. Se vuoi saperne di più su ESG (ambientale, sociale e di governance) in Otis, clicca qui.

Description Date Posted: 2025-01-14 Country: Switzerland Location: Nenzlingerweg 2, 4153 Reinach Become part of our team in Basel! Important Note This posting does not refer to an currently open position. If no suitable role matching your profile is available at the moment, we are happy to include your application in our Talent Pool. We will inform you as soon as a suitable position becomes available that matches your qualifications and interests. ## Your Future Team – Otis Basel ### Open Positions - Elevator Installers / Technicians - Service Technicians - Repair / Modernization Technicians ##
• Requirements - a Swiss federal diploma (FA) as electrician, electronics technician, electromechanical technician, mechanic, polymechanic, from the automotive industry or with equivalent qualifications - several years of practical technical experience, ideally in the elevator industry - residence within a 50 km radius of the departure point or branch in Bern/Belp - fluent German skills required for daily customer contact - a valid Swiss driving license category B - free from vertigo for work at heights ## What We Offer - market-competitive and attractive compensation - performance-based bonuses - good pension scheme - 5 weeks of vacation - meal allowance - benefits of the works council - comprehensive onboarding and support from a specialist - a company vehicle for work and private use - support and excellent career advancement opportunities ## Why Otis? Otis gives people the chance to connect in a bigger, faster, and smarter world. As a global leader in the manufacturing, installation, and maintenance of elevators and escalators, we move 2.4 billion people every day and have the largest maintenance portfolio in the world with over 2.4 million units. You can recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous monuments, including the Eiffel Tower, the Empire State Building, the Burj Khalifa, and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, functional specialists, factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in over 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse and global team with a long history of innovation that continues to be the foundation of a high-performing, fast-moving company. When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global leader with a resilient business model. You are part of a diverse, reliable, and caring community where your contributions, skills, and capabilities gained working with the best and brightest keep us connected and at the forefront.
• We offer opportunities, training, and resources that develop leadership and skills in Sales, Field, Engineering, and Major Projects. Our Employee Scholar Program is a source of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to earn degrees or certifications. Today, more than ever, our focus is on people. As a global, people-oriented company, we put passengers, customers, and colleagues at the center of everything. We are guided by our values, which we call our Three Absolutes – Safety First, Ethics, Quality in everything we do. If you want to learn more about ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) at Otis, click here. ## Join Otis and #BuildWhatsNext! Have we convinced you? We look forward to your application! Please specify in your cover letter which of the three positions you are interested in. ## About Us Otis is the world’s leading manufacturer, installer, and service provider of elevators and escalators. We move 2.4 billion people every day and maintain about 2.4 million units worldwide, with the industry’s largest service portfolio. You can recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous monuments, including the Eiffel Tower, the Empire State Building, the Burj Khalifa, and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, functional specialists, factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in over 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse and global team with a long history of innovation that continues to be the foundation of a high-performing, fast-moving company. When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global leader with a resilient business model. You are part of a diverse, reliable, and caring community where your contributions, skills, and capabilities gained working with the best and brightest keep us connected and at the forefront.
• We offer opportunities, training, and resources that develop leadership and skills in Sales, Field, Engineering, and Major Projects. Our Employee Scholar Program is a source of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to earn degrees or certifications. Today, more than ever, our focus is on people. As a global, people-oriented company, we put passengers, customers, and colleagues at the center of everything. We are guided by our values, which we call our Three Absolutes – Safety First, Ethics, Quality in everything we do. If you want to learn more about ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) at Otis, click here.

Remarque importante Cette offre ne concerne pas un poste actuellement vacant. Si aucune position adaptée à votre profil n’est disponible pour le moment, nous pouvons intégrer votre candidature dans notre Talent Pool. Nous vous informerons dès qu’un poste correspondant à vos qualifications et intérêts sera disponible. ## Votre future équipe – Otis Basel ### Postes ouverts - Monteurs / Installateurs - Techniciens de service - Techniciens de réparation / modernisation ##
• Exigences - un diplôme professionnel fédéral (FA) d’électricien, technicien en électronique, technicien électromécanicien, mécanicien, polymechanicien, ou qualification équivalente dans le secteur automobile - plusieurs années d’expérience pratique dans le domaine technique, idéalement dans le secteur des ascenseurs - résidence dans un rayon de 50 km du lieu de départ ou de la succursale de Bern/Belp - maîtrise courante de l’allemand pour le contact quotidien avec la clientèle - permis de conduire suisse valide catégorie B - absence de vertiges pour travailler en hauteur ## Ce que nous offrons - rémunération compétitive et conforme au marché - bonus liés à la performance - bonne caisse de pension - 5 semaines de congés - indemnité de repas - avantages du comité d’entreprise - formation complète et accompagnement par un professionnel - véhicule d’entreprise pour le travail et usage privé - soutien et excellentes opportunités d’évolution ## Pourquoi Otis ? Otis offre aux personnes la possibilité de se connecter dans un monde plus grand, plus rapide et plus intelligent. En tant que leader mondial dans la fabrication, l’installation et la maintenance d’ascenseurs et d’escaliers mécaniques, nous déplaçons chaque jour 2,4 milliards de personnes et disposons du plus grand portefeuille de maintenance au monde avec plus de 2,4 millions d’installations. Vous pouvez reconnaître nos produits dans certains des monuments les plus célèbres du monde, tels que la Tour Eiffel, l’Empire State Building, le Burj Khalifa et les Tours Petronas ! Nous sommes fiers d’être une équipe diversifiée et mondiale avec une longue histoire d’innovation qui continue de constituer la base d’une entreprise performante et en mouvement rapide. Vous faites partie d’une communauté diversifiée, fiable et attentionnée, où vos contributions, compétences et capacités acquises en travaillant avec les meilleurs et les plus brillants nous maintiennent connectés et à la pointe.

jobs.title: O&T Sales Lead OA

titleByLocale.fr: O & T Ventes de plomb OA

jobs.description:
Date Posted:
2026-01-04Country: 
SwitzerlandLocation: 
Route de Moncor 12, CP 1136, 1701 Fribourg
Role description

The O&T Sales Lead OA plays a pivotal role in shaping and executing the Operating Unit’s strategy for the maintenance and repair business in Switzerland. The position ensures the local sales organization is well‑structured, aligned, and fully focused on delivering business priorities and OA performance targets. With a strong sales management background, the O&T Sales Lead OA drives disciplined pipeline management, accurate forecasting, and effective sales planning. Working closely with the OA Lead and the O&T Sales Lead OU, the role leads initiatives that strengthen sales performance, commercial effectiveness, and customer value.
Success in this position requires strong organizational insight and the ability to operate effectively within a complex matrix environment. The role collaborates daily with OT Leads, Service Sales Representatives, and T Sales Representatives to achieve sales objectives, optimize processes, and continuously improve operational efficiency.

Role Responsibilities

• Implementation of annual sales strategy for maintenance and repair business

• Functional leading of the Service Sales Representatives (Generalists, Account Manager, Recovery specialists, T-Sales Representative)

• Ensure disciplined pricing execution and annual price adjustments.

• Implement effective pipeline management, CRM adoption, and sales tools

• Strengthen lead generation through digital marketing and targeted acquisition

• Analyse market trends and derive actions to grow portfolio and service contracts

• Enhance contract product offerings and drive maintenance portfolio expansion

• Manage repair sales funnel, lead generation, and customer engagement

• Plan and execute T‑campaigns to support sustainable repair (T) growth

• Support rollout of international processes/tools to meet growth targets

Role KPI’s

• ABV / O‑Sales

• O‑Margin

• T‑Orders & T‑Margin

• Conversions, Cancellations & Recaptures

• Cancellation & Recapture Rates

• Net Gain / Erosion Rate

• Customer Satisfaction (CSAT, NPS)

• OO‑Subscriptions & Forecast Accuracy (FCST vs. Actual)

Qualifications, Competencies & Skills

• 5+ years’ experience in service and repair business

• Strong understanding of maintenance, repair, and sales processes

• Fluent in German, French and English

• Ability to lead cross‑functional teams

• Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

• Strong analytical, strategic, and problem‑solving capabilities

• High customer focus and value‑driven mindset

• Results‑oriented with strong delivery record

• Collaborative team player in matrix environments

• Solid commercial acumen; skilled in sales process optimization

• Proficient with CRM and digital sales tools

• Strong coaching and development skills

• Competent in pipeline management, forecasting, and data‑driven decisions

Travel requirement - Up to 40% within Switzerland

If you live in a city, chances are we will give you a lift or play a role in keeping you moving every day. 

Otis is the world’s leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, and service company. We move 2.4 billion people every day and maintain approximately 2.4 million customer units worldwide, the industry's largest Service portfolio.  

You may recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous landmarks including the Eiffel Tower, Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people strong, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, and functional specialists, as well as factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in more than 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse, global team with a proven legacy of innovation that continues to be the bedrock of a fast-moving, high-performance company.  

When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global industry leader with a resilient business model. You’ll belong to a diverse, trusted, and caring community where your contributions, and the skills and capabilities you’ll gain working alongside the best and brightest, keep us connected and on the cutting edge.  

We provide opportunities, training, and resources, that build leadership and capabilities in Sales, Field, Engineering and Major Projects and our Employee Scholar Program is a notable point of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to pursue degrees or certification programs.   

Today, our focus more than ever is on people. As a global, people-powered company, we put people – passengers, customers, and colleagues – at the center of everything we do.  We are guided by our values that we call our Three Absolutes – prioritizing Safety, Ethics, Quality in all that we do. If you would like to learn more about environmental, social and governance (ESG) at Otis click here.  

Become a part of the Otis team and help us #Buildwhatsnext! 
Otis is An Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status, age, or any other protected class according to applicable law. To request an accommodation in completing an employment application due to a special need or a disability, please contact us at careers@otis.com.

Privacy Policy and Terms:
Click on this link to read the Policy and Terms

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Data Pubblicato: 2026-01-04 Paese: Svizzera Ubicazione: Route de Moncor 12, CP 1136, 1701 Fribourg La O&T Sales Lead OA svolge un ruolo fondamentale nella definizione e nell’esecuzione della strategia dell’Unità Operativa per la manutenzione e la riparazione in Svizzera. La posizione assicura che l'organizzazione commerciale locale sia ben strutturata, allineata e completamente focalizzata sulla fornitura di priorità aziendali e obiettivi di performance OA. Con un forte background di gestione delle vendite, O&T Sales Lead OA guida la gestione delle pipeline disciplinata, la previsione accurata e la pianificazione delle vendite efficace. Lavorando a stretto contatto con OA Lead e O&T Sales Lead OU, il ruolo guida iniziative che rafforzino le prestazioni di vendita, l'efficacia commerciale e il valore del cliente. Il successo in questa posizione richiede una forte comprensione organizzativa e la capacità di operare efficacemente all'interno di un ambiente di matrice complesso. Il ruolo collabora ogni giorno con OT Leads, rappresentanti delle vendite dei servizi e rappresentanti delle vendite T per raggiungere gli obiettivi di vendita, ottimizzare i processi e migliorare continuamente l'efficienza operativa. ## Mansioni -
• Requisiti della strategia di vendita annuale per la manutenzione e la riparazione del business - Leader funzionale dei rappresentanti delle vendite dei servizi (Generalisti, Account Manager, Specialisti di recupero, Rappresentante di T-Sales) - Assicurare l’esecuzione dei prezzi disciplinati e gli aggiustamenti annuali dei prezzi - Gestione delle operazioni di implementazione, adozione CRM e strumenti di vendita - Rafforzare la generazione dei lead attraverso il marketing digitale e l’acquisizione mirata Se vivete in una città, è probabile che vi daremo un ascensore o un ruolo nel tenervi in movimento ogni giorno. Otis è l'azienda leader mondiale nella produzione, installazione e servizio di ascensore e scale mobili. Ci muoviamo 2,4 miliardi di persone ogni giorno e manteniamo circa 2,4 milioni di unità clienti in tutto il mondo, il più grande portafoglio di servizi del settore. Potete riconoscere i nostri prodotti in alcuni dei punti di riferimento più famosi del mondo, tra cui la Torre Eiffel, l'Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa e le Petronas Twin Towers! Siamo 72,000 persone forti, tra cui ingegneri, esperti di tecnologia digitale, vendite e specialisti funzionali, nonché tecnici di fabbrica e campo, tutti impegnati a soddisfare le diverse esigenze dei nostri clienti e passeggeri in oltre 200 paesi e territori in tutto il mondo. Siamo orgogliosi di essere un team diversificato e globale con una comprovata eredità di innovazione che continua ad essere la base di una società veloce e performante. Quando ti unisci a Otis, diventi parte di un innovativo leader mondiale nel settore con un modello di business resiliente. Appartenerai a una comunità diversificata, affidabile e premurosa dove i tuoi contributi, e le competenze e le capacità che otterrai lavorare insieme al meglio e più luminoso, ci tengono connessi e all'avanguardia. Forniamo opportunità, formazione e risorse, che costruiscono leadership e capacità in Vendite, Field, Ingegneria e Progetti Maggiori e il nostro programma di studio dei dipendenti è un punto di orgoglio notevole, attraverso il quale Otis sponsorizza i colleghi a perseguire gradi o programmi di certificazione. Oggi, il nostro focus più che mai è sulle persone. Come azienda globale, alimentata da persone, mettiamo persone – passeggeri, clienti e colleghi – al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. Siamo guidati dai nostri valori che chiamiamo i nostri Tre Assoluti – privilegiando Sicurezza, Etica, Qualità in tutto ciò che facciamo. Se volete saperne di più su ambiente, sociale e governance (ESG) a Otis clicca qui. Diventa parte della squadra Otis e aiutaci #Buildwhatsnext! ## Contatto Otis is An Equal Opportunity Employer. Tutti i candidati qualificati riceveranno considerazione per l'occupazione senza riguardo a razza, colore, religione, sesso, orientamento sessuale, identità di genere, origine nazionale, disabilità o status veterano, età, o qualsiasi altra classe protetta secondo la legge applicabile. Per richiedere un alloggio nel completamento di una domanda di lavoro a causa di una necessità speciale o di una disabilità, si prega di contattarci a careers@otis.com. e Termini: Clicca su questo link per leggere la Politica e i Termini

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Datum Veröffentlicht: 2026-01-04 Land: Schweiz Ort: Route de Moncor 12, CP 1136, 1701 Fribourg Die O&T Sales Lead OA spielt eine zentrale Rolle bei der Gestaltung und Durchführung der Strategie des Operating Unit für das Instandhaltungs- und Reparaturgeschäft in der Schweiz. Die Position sorgt dafür, dass die lokale Vertriebsorganisation gut strukturiert, ausgerichtet und vollständig auf die Bereitstellung von Geschäftsprioritäten und OA-Leistungszielen ausgerichtet ist. Mit einem starken Vertriebsmanagement-Hintergrund treibt die O&T Sales Lead OA diszipliniertes Pipelinemanagement, genaue Prognosen und effektive Vertriebsplanung an. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit dem OA Lead und dem O&T Sales Lead OU führt die Rolle Initiativen, die die Verkaufsleistung, die kommerzielle Effektivität und den Kundenwert stärken. Der Erfolg in dieser Position erfordert eine starke organisatorische Einsicht und die Fähigkeit, effektiv in einer komplexen Matrixumgebung zu arbeiten. Die Rolle arbeitet täglich mit OT Leads, Service Sales Representatives und T Sales Representatives zusammen, um Vertriebsziele zu erreichen, Prozesse zu optimieren und die operative Effizienz kontinuierlich zu verbessern. - Implementierung der jährlichen Vertriebsstrategie für Wartungs- und Reparaturgeschäfte - Funktionsführung der Service Sales Representatives (Generalisten, Account Manager, Recovery Spezialisten, T-Sales Representative) - Sicherstellung der disziplinierten Preisausführung und jährlichen Preisanpassungen - Implementierung eines effektiven Pipeline-Managements, CRM-Adoption und Vertriebstools - Stärkung der Lead-Generation durch digitales Marketing und gezielte Übernahme Wenn Sie in einer Stadt leben, werden wir Ihnen einen Aufzug geben oder eine Rolle spielen, wenn Sie sich jeden Tag bewegen. Otis ist das weltweit führende Aufzug- und Eskalator-Produktions-, Installations- und Serviceunternehmen. Wir bewegen 2,4 Milliarden Menschen jeden Tag und halten rund 2,4 Millionen Kundeneinheiten weltweit, das größte Service-Portfolio der Branche. Sie können unsere Produkte in einigen der berühmtesten Wahrzeichen der Welt erkennen, darunter der Eiffelturm, Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa und die Petronas Twin Towers! Wir sind 72.000 Menschen stark, darunter Ingenieure, Digitaltechnik-Experten, Vertrieb und funktionelle Spezialisten, sowie Fabrik- und Feldtechniker, alle verpflichtet, die vielfältigen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden und Passagiere in mehr als 200 Ländern und Gebieten weltweit zu erfüllen. Wir sind stolz darauf, ein vielfältiges, globales Team mit einem bewährten Innovationsvermächtnis zu sein, das weiterhin das Fundament eines schnelllebigen, leistungsstarken Unternehmens ist. Wenn Sie Otis beitreten, werden Sie Teil eines innovativen globalen Branchenführers mit einem elastischen Geschäftsmodell. Sie gehören zu einer vielfältigen, vertrauenswürdigen und pflegenden Gemeinschaft, wo Ihre Beiträge, und die Fähigkeiten und Fähigkeiten, die Sie zusammen mit den besten und hellsten, halten Sie uns verbunden und an der Spitze.
• Wir bieten Möglichkeiten, Schulungen und Ressourcen, die Führung und Fähigkeiten in Sales, Field, Engineering und Major Projects bauen und unser Employee Scholar Program ist ein bemerkenswerter Punkt des Stolzes, durch den Otis Kollegen fördert Grad oder Zertifizierungsprogramme zu verfolgen. Heute steht unser Fokus mehr denn je auf Menschen. Als globales, menschenbewährtes Unternehmen stellen wir Menschen – Passagiere, Kunden und Kollegen – im Zentrum von allem, was wir tun. Wir werden von unseren Werten geleitet, die wir unsere Drei Absoluten nennen – die Priorisierung von Sicherheit, Ethik, Qualität in allem, was wir tun. Wenn Sie mehr über Umwelt, soziale und Governance (ESG) bei Otis erfahren möchten, klicken Sie bitte hier. Werden Sie Teil des Otis Teams und helfen Sie uns #Buildwhatsnext! Contatto Otis ist ein Arbeitgeber der Chancengleichheit. Alle qualifizierten Bewerber erhalten eine Berücksichtigung für die Beschäftigung ohne Bezug auf Rasse, Farbe, Religion, Sex, sexuelle Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität, nationale Herkunft, Behinderung oder veteranen Status, Alter oder jede andere geschützte Klasse nach geltendem Recht. Um eine Unterkunft bei der Beendigung einer Bewerbung aufgrund eines besonderen Bedarfs oder einer Behinderung anzufordern, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte unter careers@otis.com. und Bedingungen: Klicken Sie auf diesen Link, um die Richtlinien und Bedingungen zu lesen
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Date d'envoi: 2026-01-04 Pays: Suisse Lieu: Route de Moncor 12, CP 1136, 1701 Fribourg L'O & T Sales Lead OA joue un rôle central dans l'élaboration et l'exécution de la stratégie de l'unité opérationnelle pour l'entretien et la réparation en Suisse. Le poste s'assure que l'organisation de vente locale est bien structurée, alignée et entièrement axée sur l'atteinte des priorités opérationnelles et des objectifs de rendement du Bureau. Fort d'une solide expérience en matière de gestion des ventes, le Bureau du chef des ventes en O et T est responsable de la gestion disciplinée des pipelines, de la prévision exacte et de la planification efficace des ventes. En travaillant en étroite collaboration avec le chef de file de l'OA et le chef de file des ventes de F et T, le rôle dirige des initiatives qui renforcent le rendement des ventes, l'efficacité commerciale et la valeur client. Le succès dans ce poste exige une solide compréhension organisationnelle et la capacité de fonctionner efficacement dans un environnement matriciel complexe. Le rôle collabore quotidiennement avec OT Leads, Service Sales Representants et T Sales Representants pour atteindre les objectifs de vente, optimiser les processus et améliorer continuellement l'efficacité opérationnelle. ## Mansioni - Mise en oeuvre d'une stratégie de vente annuelle pour les entreprises d'entretien et de réparation - Chef de file fonctionnel des représentants des ventes de services (généralistes, gestionnaires de comptes, spécialistes de la récupération, représentant T-Sales) - Assurer une exécution rigoureuse des prix et des ajustements annuels des prix - Mettre en oeuvre une gestion efficace des pipelines, l'adoption de CRM et les outils de vente - Renforcer la production de plomb grâce au marketing numérique et à l'acquisition ciblée - Analyser les tendances du marché et élaborer des mesures pour accroître les contrats de portefeuille et de service - Améliorer les offres de produits contractuels et stimuler l'expansion du portefeuille de maintenance - Gérer l'entonnoir de vente de réparation, la production de plomb et l'engagement des clients - Planifier et exécuter des campagnes T pour soutenir la croissance durable de la réparation (T) - Soutenir le déploiement de processus/outils internationaux pour atteindre les objectifs de croissance ## KPI - ABV / O‐Sales - O‐Margin - T‐Orders & T‐Margin - Conversions, annulations & Recaptures - Annulation & Recapture Tarifs - Gain net / Erosion Taux - Satisfaction des Si vous vivez dans une ville, les chances sont que nous vous donnerons un ascenseur ou jouerons un rôle en vous faisant bouger chaque jour. Otis est le leader mondial de la fabrication, de l'installation et du service d'ascenseur et d'escalator. Nous déplaçons 2,4 milliards de personnes chaque jour et entretenons environ 2,4 millions d'unités clientes dans le monde, le plus important portefeuille de services de l'industrie. Vous pouvez reconnaître nos produits dans certains des monuments les plus célèbres du monde, y compris la Tour Eiffel, l'Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa et les tours jumelles Petronas ! Nous sommes 72.000 personnes fortes, y compris des ingénieurs, des experts en technologie numérique, des vendeurs et des spécialistes fonctionnels, ainsi que des techniciens d'usine et de terrain, tous engagés à répondre aux divers besoins de nos clients et passagers dans plus de 200 pays et territoires dans le monde. Nous sommes fiers d'être une équipe diversifiée et mondiale avec un héritage d'innovation éprouvé qui continue d'être le fondement d'une entreprise rapide et performante. Lorsque vous rejoignez Otis, vous devenez membre d'un chef de file innovant de l'industrie mondiale avec un modèle d'affaires résilient. Vous appartenez à une communauté diversifiée, fiable et bienveillante où vos contributions, et les compétences et les capacités que vous gagnerez à travailler avec les meilleurs et les plus brillants, nous garder connectés et à la fine pointe.
• Nous offrons des occasions, de la formation et des ressources qui renforcent le leadership et les capacités dans les domaines des ventes, du terrain, de l'ingénierie et des grands projets ainsi que dans le cadre de notre Programme de bourses d'études des employés est un point de fierté notable, grâce auquel Otis parraine des collègues pour poursuivre des programmes de diplômes ou de certification. Aujourd'hui, nous nous concentrons plus que jamais sur les gens. En tant qu'entreprise mondiale à puissance humaine, nous mettons les gens – passagers, clients et collègues – au centre de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous sommes guidés par nos valeurs que nous appelons nos Trois Absolus – prioriser la sécurité, l'éthique, la qualité dans tout ce que nous faisons. Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur l'environnement, la société et la gouvernance (ESG) à Otis cliquez ici. Devenez membre de l'équipe d'Otis et aidez-nous #Builddhatsnext! ## Contatto Otis est un employeur de l'égalité des chances. Tous les candidats qualifiés seront considérés pour un emploi sans considération de race, de couleur, de religion, de sexe, d'orientation sexuelle, d'identité de genre, d'origine nationale, de handicap ou de statut d'ancien combattant, d'âge ou de toute autre catégorie protégée conformément à la loi applicable. Pour demander une mesure d'adaptation pour remplir une demande d'emploi en raison d'un besoin spécial ou d'un handicap, veuillez communiquer avec nous à carriees@otis.com. et conditions: Cliquez sur ce lien pour lire la politique et les conditions

jobs.title: Aufzugsmonteur (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Date Posted:
2026-02-05Country: 
SwitzerlandLocation: 
Walenbüchelstrasse 3, 9000 St-Gallen, Switzerland

Was dich bei uns erwartet

Du bist verantwortlich für die komplette mechanische und elektrische Montage, sowie die Inbetriebnahme unserer Neuanlagen auf den dir anvertrauten Baustellen. Dabei organisierst Du sämtliche Montagephasen von der Entgegennahme des Materials bis zur Übergabe der fertigen Anlage an den Kunden.

Was wir von dir erwarten

• Du hast eine abgeschlossene technische Ausbildung wie Elektromonteur/in, Polymechaniker/in, Automechaniker/in oder Ähnliches. Wenn du dich bereits mit Aufzügen auskennst, um so besser!

• Du übernimmst gerne eigene Verantwortung und hast keine Angst, dir die Hände schmutzig zu machen.

• Du planst und koordinierst deinen Tag selbstständig.

• Wir setzen einen Führerschein der Klasse B voraus.

Deine Benefits

• Du wirst von einer Fachperson top eingearbeitet und begleitet

• Du bekommst ein Firmenfahrzeug für die Arbeit und Privat

• Du wirst von uns unterstützt und hast großartige Aufstiegsmöglichkeiten

• Verpflegungszuschuss

• Gute Pensionskasse

• 5 Wochen Ferien

Unsere Firmenkultur ist unser wichtigstes Gut und ist tief im Unternehmen verankert und wird von allen Mitarbeitern gelebt und geschätzt. Mehr Informationen über unsere «Otis Absolutes» findest Du hier.

Steige ein – Steige auf!

Haben wir dich überzeugt? Unser Recruiting Team freut sich auf deine Bewerbung.
If you live in a city, chances are we will give you a lift or play a role in keeping you moving every day. 

Otis is the world’s leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, and service company. We move 2.4 billion people every day and maintain approximately 2.4 million customer units worldwide, the industry's largest Service portfolio.  

You may recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous landmarks including the Eiffel Tower, Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people strong, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, and functional specialists, as well as factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in more than 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse, global team with a proven legacy of innovation that continues to be the bedrock of a fast-moving, high-performance company.  

When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global industry leader with a resilient business model. You’ll belong to a diverse, trusted, and caring community where your contributions, and the skills and capabilities you’ll gain working alongside the best and brightest, keep us connected and on the cutting edge.  

We provide opportunities, training, and resources, that build leadership and capabilities in Sales, Field, Engineering and Major Projects and our Employee Scholar Program is a notable point of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to pursue degrees or certification programs.   

Today, our focus more than ever is on people. As a global, people-powered company, we put people – passengers, customers, and colleagues – at the center of everything we do.  We are guided by our values that we call our Three Absolutes – prioritizing Safety, Ethics, Quality in all that we do. If you would like to learn more about environmental, social and governance (ESG) at Otis click here.  

Become a part of the Otis team and help us #Buildwhatsnext! 
Otis is An Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status, age, or any other protected class according to applicable law. To request an accommodation in completing an employment application due to a special need or a disability, please contact us at careers@otis.com.

Privacy Policy and Terms:
Click on this link to read the Policy and Terms

descriptionByLocale.it:
Data di pubblicazione: 2026-02-05Paese: SvizzeraIndirizzo: Walenbüchelstrasse 3, 9000 St-Gallen, Svizzera Cosa ci aspettiamo da te Sei responsabile della completa montaggio meccanico ed elettrico, nonché l'installazione delle nostre nuove strutture sulle tue aree di lavoro assegnate. Organizzi tutte le fasi di montaggio, dalla ricezione dei materiali alla consegna della struttura completa al cliente. Cosa ci aspettiamo da te Hai una formazione tecnica completata come elettricista, meccanico, autotecnico o simili. Se già hai esperienza con gli ascensori, tanto meglio! Sei disposto a prendere la responsabilità e non hai paura di sporcarti le mani. Piani e coordini il tuo giorno in modo autonomo. Richiediamo un patente di guida di classe B. I tuoi benefici Sarai inserito in un ambiente di lavoro professionale e supportato. Avrai un'auto aziendale per lavoro e per privato. Sarai sostenuto e avrai grandi opportunità di carriera. Contributo alimentazione. Pensione di buon livello. 5 settimane di ferie. La nostra cultura aziendale è il nostro bene più prezioso e si trova profondamente radicata nel nostro organismo e vissuta e apprezzata da tutti i nostri dipendenti. Per ulteriori informazioni sulle nostre "Otis Absolutes" clicca qui. Salta su – salta avanti! Siamo convinti di aver trovato la persona giusta? Il nostro team di reclutamento si compiace della tua candidatura. Se vivi in una città, è probabile che ti daremo un passaggio o che tu sia coinvolto nel mantenerti in movimento ogni giorno. Otis è la società leader mondiale nella produzione, installazione e manutenzione di ascensori e scale mobili. Moviamo 2,4 miliardi di persone ogni giorno e manteniamo circa 2,4 milioni di unità di servizio clienti in tutto il mondo, il più grande portafoglio di servizi dell'industria. Potresti riconoscere i nostri prodotti in alcuni dei più famosi monumenti del mondo, come la Torre Eiffel, l'Empire State Building, il Burj Khalifa e le Torri Petronas! Siamo 72.000 persone forti, tra ingegneri, esperti di tecnologia digitale, venditori e specialisti funzionali, nonché tecnici di fabbrica e campo, tutti impegnati a soddisfare le esigenze diverse dei nostri clienti e passeggeri in più di 200 paesi e territori in tutto il mondo. Siamo orgogliosi di essere una squadra globale diversificata con una leggenda di innovazione provata che continua a essere la base di un'azienda veloce, di alta prestazione. Quando ti unisci a Otis, diventi parte di un leader globale innovativo dell'industria con un modello di business resiliente. Appartieni a una comunità diversificata, affidabile e premurosa in cui le tue contribuzioni e le abilità e competenze che acquisisci lavorando accanto ai migliori e più brillanti ti tengono connesso e all'avanguardia.
• Offriamo opportunità, formazione e risorse che costruiscono leadership e competenze in Vendita, Campo, Ingegneria e Progetti Principali e il nostro Programma di Laurea per Dipendenti è un punto di orgoglio notevole, attraverso cui Otis sostiene i colleghi per perseguire gradi o programmi di certificazione. Oggi, il nostro focus è più che mai su persone. Come società globale guidata dalle persone, mettiamo le persone – passeggeri, clienti e colleghi – al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. Siamo guidati dai nostri valori che chiamiamo le nostre Tre Assolute – priorizzando la Sicurezza, l'Etica e la Qualità in tutto ciò che facciamo. Se desideri imparare di più sull'ambiente, la società e la governance (ESG) di Otis clicca qui. Diventa parte dell'equipe di Otis e aiutaci a #Costruisciilfuturo!

Wenn du in einer Stadt lebst, ist es wahrscheinlich, dass wir dir einen Lift geben oder eine Rolle bei der Bewegung spielen, die du jeden Tag erlebst. Otis ist die weltweit führende Gesellschaft für die Herstellung, Installation und Wartung von Aufzügen und Rolltreppen. Wir bewegen 2,4 Milliarden Menschen jeden Tag und unterhalten etwa 2,4 Millionen Kundenanlagen weltweit, das größte Service-Portfolio der Branche. Du erkennst vielleicht unsere Produkte in einigen der berühmtesten Wahrzeichen der Welt, wie der Eiffelturm, dem Empire State Building, dem Burj Khalifa und den Petronas-Twin-Türmen! Wir sind 72.000 Menschen stark, darunter Ingenieure, digitale Technologie-Experten, Verkäufer und funktionalen Spezialisten, sowie Fabrik- und Feldtechniker, die sich alle bemühen, die vielfältigen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden und Fahrgäste in über 200 Ländern und Territorien weltweit zu erfüllen. Wir sind stolz darauf, eine vielfältige, globale Mannschaft zu sein, mit einer bewährten Legende der Innovation, die weiterhin die Grundlage eines schnellen, hochleistungsfähigen Unternehmens bildet. Wenn du dich Otis anschließt, wirst du Teil eines innovativen globalen Industrieführers mit einem resilienten Geschäftsmodell. Du gehörst zu einer vielfältigen, vertrauenswürdigen und sorgenden Gemeinschaft, in der deine Beiträge und die Fähigkeiten und Kompetenzen, die du erwerbst, indem du mit den Besten und Brillantesten zusammenarbeitest, dich mit den neuesten Entwicklungen verbindest.
• Wir bieten Möglichkeiten, Ausbildung und Ressourcen, die Führung und Kompetenzen in Verkauf, Feld, Ingenieurwesen und Großprojekten aufbauen und unser Programm für Studierende ist ein bemerkenswertes Highlight, durch das Otis Kollegen unterstützt, um Abschlüsse oder Zertifizierungsprogramme zu verfolgen. Heute ist unser Fokus mehr als je zuvor auf Menschen gerichtet. Als globale, von Menschen getriebene Gesellschaft setzen wir Menschen – Fahrgäste, Kunden und Kollegen – in den Mittelpunkt alles, was wir tun. Wir werden von unseren Werten geleitet, die wir unsere Drei Absoluten nennen – Sicherheit, Ethik und Qualität in allem, was wir tun. Wenn du mehr über Umwelt, Gesellschaft und Governance (ESG) bei Otis erfahren möchtest, klicke hier. Werd Teil der Otis-Team und hilf uns #Bauwasnächst!

jobs.title: HR Business Partner Switzerland (m/w/x)
jobs.description:
Date Posted:
2026-04-03Country: 
SwitzerlandLocation: 
Route de Moncor 12, CP 464, 1701 FribourgJob Description

HR Business Partner Switzerland 

Role Context
The HR Business Partner develops and implements both long-term and short-term strategies that align structure, culture, and talent with business goals, providing individual support and coaching for the Swiss area.
They offer expertise and guidance in areas such as HR and business strategy alignment, organizational design, workforce planning, employee engagement, and culture and change management. The role fosters a positive and inclusive work environment as a competitive advantage.

Among the many topics over and above the already mentioned are:

• Develop a people strategy aligned with global and regional strategies.

• Collaborate with business leadership on talent management, organizational design, strategic workforce planning, and culture development.

• Partner / Broker with HR COEs, functional HRBPs to ensure implementation of appropriate/ aligned strategies, programs & processes.

Partnering with the COEs (Talent Acquisition, Talent Development, Change Management, Total Reward):       

• Develop and implement strategies to attract, develop, and retain diverse talent.

• Personal ownership for key HR metrics (recruitment, development, retention, etc.) for their client group, making deep dive to root cause and develop and execute appropriate countermeasures where needed.

• Lead talent assessment in the organization, identifying key employee strengths and development needs to select, retain and develop key talent.

• Lead succession planning and talent development strategies for the organization, identifying critical roles and preparing potential talent and pipelines.      

• Drive and sustain the key processes around engagement, from analysis, communication, feedback, and action planning.   

• Lead client groups through critical HR operating rhythms such as merit & bonus planning, performance management and Talent Review.

• Being the escalation point for complex case management and provides expert advice to managers on employee issues including discipline and grievance.

• Works with leaders and managers to professionally execute corporate policies and HR programs ensuring appropriate and agreed levels of quality, delivery and cost.  

• Partner & manage local labor & employee relations ensuring legal compliance. 

• Serve as a member of the Swiss leadership team, the pension foundation board, and the works council.

Professional Experience / Qualification

• Co- create, implement, and execute programs to support the business & people strategy

• You have a degree and / or the 'eidgenössische Fachausweis (FA) im Personalwesen/HR' , having a strong knowledge of Swiss labor laws, regulations, and HR practices with a proven experience in Employee Relations, conflict resolution, or mediation and knowledge of collective bargaining law

• You enjoy shaping change processes and feel comfortable in a matrix organization.

• You can keep several balls in the air at the same time and don't let yourself get rattled.

• You enjoy working with people and impress with your high level of social skills, team orientation and confident demeanor.

• You are well-versed in MS Office 365 and have already worked with Workday.

• Fluency in French as well as German are a prerequisite

• Since we work in an international environment, fluent written and spoken English is also mandatory

• You have strong change management expertise and a solid understanding of business and financial topics.

You are open to travel across our Swiss sites to partner with in-country teams where needed.

Colleague Value Proposition
When you join Otis, you become part of a respected team with a proven ability to develop, build and succeed for generations. You belong to a trusted, caring community where your contributions, and the skills and capabilities you’ll gain working alongside the best and brightest, will keep us connected and on the cutting edge. 

If you live in a city, chances are we will give you a lift or play a role in keeping you moving every day. 

Otis is the world’s leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, and service company. We move 2.4 billion people every day and maintain approximately 2.4 million customer units worldwide, the industry's largest Service portfolio.  

You may recognize our products in some of the world’s most famous landmarks including the Eiffel Tower, Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa and the Petronas Twin Towers! We are 72,000 people strong, including engineers, digital technology experts, sales, and functional specialists, as well as factory and field technicians, all committed to meeting the diverse needs of our customers and passengers in more than 200 countries and territories worldwide. We are proud to be a diverse, global team with a proven legacy of innovation that continues to be the bedrock of a fast-moving, high-performance company.  

When you join Otis, you become part of an innovative global industry leader with a resilient business model. You’ll belong to a diverse, trusted, and caring community where your contributions, and the skills and capabilities you’ll gain working alongside the best and brightest, keep us connected and on the cutting edge.  

We provide opportunities, training, and resources, that build leadership and capabilities in Sales, Field, Engineering and Major Projects and our Employee Scholar Program is a notable point of pride, through which Otis sponsors colleagues to pursue degrees or certification programs.   

Today, our focus more than ever is on people. As a global, people-powered company, we put people – passengers, customers, and colleagues – at the center of everything we do.  We are guided by our values that we call our Three Absolutes – prioritizing Safety, Ethics, Quality in all that we do. If you would like to learn more about environmental, social and governance (ESG) at Otis click here.  

Become a part of the Otis team and help us #Buildwhatsnext! 
Otis is An Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status, age, or any other protected class according to applicable law. To request an accommodation in completing an employment application due to a special need or a disability, please contact us at careers@otis.com.

Appartenete a una comunità di fiducia e cura dove i vostri contributi, e le competenze e le capacità che otterrete lavorare insieme al migliore e più luminoso, ci terranno collegati e sul bordo superiore. Se vivete in una città, è probabile che vi daremo un ascensore o un ruolo nel tenervi in movimento ogni giorno. Otis è l'azienda leader mondiale nella produzione, installazione e servizio di ascensore e scale mobili. Ci muoviamo 2,4 miliardi di persone ogni giorno e manteniamo circa 2,4 milioni di unità clienti in tutto il mondo, il più grande portafoglio di servizi del settore. Potete riconoscere i nostri prodotti in alcuni dei punti di riferimento più famosi del mondo, tra cui la Torre Eiffel, l'Empire State Building, Burj Khalifa e le Petronas Twin Towers! Siamo 72,000 persone forti, tra cui ingegneri, esperti di tecnologia digitale, vendite e specialisti funzionali, nonché tecnici di fabbrica e campo, tutti impegnati a soddisfare le diverse esigenze dei nostri clienti e passeggeri in oltre 200 paesi e territori in tutto il mondo. Siamo orgogliosi di essere un team diversificato e globale con una comprovata eredità di innovazione che continua ad essere la base di una società veloce e performante. Quando ti unisci a Otis, diventi parte di un innovativo leader mondiale nel settore con un modello di business resiliente. Appartenerai a una comunità diversificata, affidabile e premurosa dove i tuoi contributi, e le competenze e le capacità che otterrai lavorare insieme al meglio e più luminoso, ci tengono connessi e all'avanguardia. Forniamo opportunità, formazione e risorse, che costruiscono leadership e capacità in Vendite, Field, Ingegneria e Progetti Maggiori e il nostro programma di studio dei dipendenti è un punto di orgoglio notevole, attraverso il quale Otis sponsorizza i colleghi a perseguire gradi o programmi di certificazione. Oggi, il nostro focus più che mai è sulle persone. Come azienda globale, alimentata da persone, mettiamo persone – passeggeri, clienti e colleghi – al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. Siamo guidati dai nostri valori che chiamiamo i nostri Tre Assoluti – privilegiando Sicurezza, Etica, Qualità in tutto ciò che facciamo. ## Contatto Diventa parte del team Otis e aiutaci #Buildwhatsnext! Otis è un dipendente di pari opportunità. Tutti i candidati qualificati riceveranno considerazione per l'occupazione senza riguardo a razza, colore, religione, sesso, orientamento sessuale, identità di genere, origine nazionale, disabilità o status veterano, età, o qualsiasi altra classe protetta secondo la legge applicabile. They offer expertise and guidance in areas such as HR and business strategy alignment, organizational design, workforce planning, employee engagement, and culture and change management. The role fosters a positive and inclusive work environment as a competitive advantage. Among the many topics over and above the already mentioned are:

• Collaborate with business leadership on talent management, organizational design, strategic workforce planning, and culture development.

• Works with leaders and managers to professionally execute corporate policies and HR programs ensuring appropriate and agreed levels of quality, delivery and cost.
• Partner & manage local labor & employee relations ensuring legal compliance.
• Serve as a member of the Swiss leadership team, the pension foundation board, and the works council. Professional Experience / Qualification
• Co- create, implement, and execute programs to support the business & people strategy
• You have a degree and / or the 'eidgenössische Fachausweis (FA) im Personalwesen/HR' , having a strong knowledge of Swiss labor laws, regulations, and HR practices with a proven experience in Employee Relations, conflict resolution, or mediation and knowledge of collective bargaining law
• You enjoy shaping change processes and feel comfortable in a matrix organization.
• You can keep several balls in the air at the same time and don't let yourself get rattled.
• You enjoy working with people and impress with your high level of social skills, team orientation and confident demeanor.

• You have strong change management expertise and a solid understanding of business and financial topics. You are open to travel across our Swiss sites to partner with in-country teams where needed.
